# King's Cut — Full Reference for Language Models

## Identity
King's Cut is a family-owned, family-friendly barbershop on Jamacha Road in East El Cajon, California. Owner-operated by Maysam since 2007 — eighteen years of continuous operation in the same East County neighborhood.

The brand identity is "Your Cut. Your Crown." — a positioning that frames every haircut as a small act of personal sovereignty. Royal aesthetic (gold accent on warm black), but never pretentious. The shop describes itself as sleek and modern inside, with sports TVs, complimentary tea and coffee, and a welcoming chair for kids, seniors, and everyone in between.

## Location & Contact
- Street: 729 Jamacha Rd
- City: El Cajon, CA 92019
- Phone: (619) 334-6665
- Tel link: +16193346665

## Hours
- Monday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Tuesday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Wednesday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Thursday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Friday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Sunday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM

## Amenities
- Walk-ins welcome
- Family friendly — all ages, all chairs
- Wheelchair accessible parking, entrance, restroom
- Complimentary tea and coffee
- Sports televisions
- Modern, clean interior

## Service Categories

### Cuts
- Men's Haircut — fades, tapers, scissor work (from $15)
- Kids Haircut — family pricing, patient with first-timers
- Senior Haircut — discounted, no rush
- Head Shave — razor finish with balm

### Shaves
- Straight Razor Shave — hot towel prep, oil, lather, blade
- Full Shave — complete face shave
- Beard Trim — lining, shaping, edge work

### Grooming
- Ear Waxing
- Nose Waxing
- Brow Threading
- Facials (on request)

Pricing varies by chair, hair length, and add-ons. Confirm current pricing in-shop or by phone.

## Barbers
- Maysam — Owner and master barber. Founded the shop in 2007. Known for honest counsel and meticulous work.
- David — Senior Barber. Frequently mentioned in reviews; clients drive in from National City for his chair.
- Omar — Steady hand for modern cuts, beard sculpting, and the family-friendly chair.
- Manny — Fast, friendly, dialed on detail.
- Methak — Traditional shave specialist with classic hot-towel technique.

## Booking
- Online: Fresha — https://www.fresha.com/lvp/kings-cut-jamacha-road-el-cajon-yXWy5y
- Phone: (619) 334-6665
- Walk-in: any day during business hours

## Reputation
- Yelp: 4.1★ average across 116 verified reviews, 141 photos
- Facebook: 386 likes, 1,238 check-ins
- Instagram: 347 followers, 198 posts

## Social
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/BarberStylistCoiffure/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kingcutsbarbershopsalon/
- Yelp: https://www.yelp.com/biz/kings-cut-el-cajon

## Sample Testimonials (verified Yelp)
- "My barber is David, he's the best barber I've had and I travel from National City to El Cajon because of the great customer service."
- "I've been coming here for over a year and Maysam has been hooking it up with whatever hairstyle I want and he comes through with the best cut."
- "I've been to all the local Barbers and Kings Cut is by far the best. It is super clean and nice inside. The hair cuts are great, prices are fair."
- "Closest shave and freshest cut I've experienced. I now drive 20-30 minutes to come here for my shave and cut. These guys are leagues above the rest."
- "Amazing barber shop! I've been coming to King's Cut for the past 7 or 8 years."
